appliedIndexes: idx_reviews_list ON reviews (place_id, status, created_at DESC, id DESC)
idx_place_comments_parent_list ON place_comments (place_id, status, parent_id, created_at ASC, id ASC)
idx_place_comments_reply_list ON place_comments (parent_id, status, created_at ASC, id ASC)
idx_forum_threads_list ON forum_threads (category_id, status, pinned_at DESC, last_activity_at DESC, id DESC)
idx_forum_posts_list ON forum_posts (thread_id, status, created_at ASC, id ASC)
idx_content_reports_status_list ON content_reports (status, created_at DESC, id DESC)
idx_moderation_actions_target ON moderation_actions (target_type, target_id, created_at DESC, id DESC)

nPlusOneQueries.behavior: Replaces multiple serial queries with exactly 1 batched query using SQL IN (:ids)
